items.claim: Kho has significantly better wrestling than JPL.
items.quote: Kho has the better wrestling by a long shot.

items.claim: JPL has significantly better grappling than Kho.
items.quote: However, JPL has the better grappling by a long shot.

items.claim: Kho is more susceptible to being knocked out than JPL.
items.quote: Kho is actually chinnier than JPL despite JPL not being the most durable.

items.claim: Kho has been knocked out twice by lower-level competition.
items.quote: Kho has been flatlined twice um and by not the greatest fighters.

items.claim: Kho's habit of keeping his hands low and chin high makes him easier to hit.
items.quote: with his hands out and his chin up especially, it kind of aggravates it even more.

items.claim: JPL possesses more nuanced striking skills including pocket boxing and head kicks.
items.quote: JPL definitely has the more nuanced stand up with like the pocket boxing, the head kicks, and so on.

items.claim: Bashi lacks nuanced defensive striking skills.
items.quote: He can definitely be clipped on the feet though because he doesn't really have any nuance defense.

items.claim: Delgado has failed to show improvement in his defensive striking flaws between his recent fights.
items.quote: he has a lot of defensive flaws and I haven't seen evidence that they're improving at all
Delgado is not going to provide any resistance for the takedown.
